schema_note: spot signature-screen seed graph. Numbers from Marson2025 GWCD4i DE_stats + sgRNA library (public). Edge stats are the real tests each edge runs; *_placeholder marks values resolved live by the confirm adapters.

center.program_shifted: TCR/Ras-MAPK signalling gain (RasGAP removed) -> enhanced effector activation

cell_type.test: Is RASA2 expressed + is the Ras-MAPK effector program present in CD8 T cells? Pull Census pseudobulk expression of RASA2 and its DE-gene signature in CD8 vs CD4.
trust_surface: RASA2 mean expr (CPM) in CD8 vs CD4
fraction of Marson RASA2 DE genes expressed in CD8

cell_type.test: Context-specificity check: is the effector-gain signature attenuated/opposite in Tregs? Compare signature score in Treg vs conventional CD4.

disease.test: Open Targets GraphQL: association_score(RASA2, IBD) + genetic evidence (GWAS/coloc, ClinVar). Does human genetics implicate RASA2 in immune dysregulation?
OT target-disease + tractability; RASA2 as RasGAP tumor-suppressor context vs T-cell-intrinsic checkpoint role.

population.test: Donor-consistency: recompute RASA2 effect per donor (D1,D2) x condition; agree on sign + significance. NOTE: within-dataset -> consistency, NOT replication.
trust_surface: per-donor effect size D1 vs D2

context_stim.test: Context-robustness: effect present and same sign in Rest, Stim8hr, Stim48hr (already true: -11.3/-14.4/-14.2, 3/3 sig). Flags context_specific vs robust.

modality_replication.dataset: GEO (e.g. Carnevale et al. 2022 Nature, RASA2 ablation in T cells; GSE-series)
modality_replication.test: REPLICATION (independent dataset + independent modality): in an independent RASA2-perturbation dataset, does removing RASA2 shift the same effector/activation program in the same direction? Requires dataset_id != Marson AND corroborating_hit_ids link.
trust_surface: overlap of DE gene sets (Jaccard) with Marson RASA2 signature

predictive.test: Model ranked RASA2 as a high-value effector-enhancing target BEFORE confirmation. Typed predictive + untested; capped weight; may prioritize, never self-confirm.
